name: Bagani Laon Core
spec: SAE 10W / 30 / 40 / 50 | API CF/SF | Super Heavy Duty
shortDesc: Super heavy duty engine oil. Premium protection for diesel and gasoline engines in multiple grades.
description: A high-performance motor oil designed to deliver premium protection for both diesel and gasoline engines. Especially formulated for heavy-duty operation in diesel engines used in on-highway and off-highway vehicles and equipment. Available in four grades — SAE 10W, 30, 40, and 50 — for maximum flexibility across different applications.
description2: Advanced dispersant technology prevents oil thickening from soot and combustion byproducts. SAE 10W and SAE 30 grades meet GMC Allison C-3 requirements, making them suitable for automatic transmissions and torque converters.

features.title: Advanced Dispersant Technology
features.desc: Prevents oil thickening caused by incomplete combustion and soot formation, keeping particles suspended and extending filter life.

features.title: Multi-Grade Flexibility
features.desc: Available in SAE 10W, 30, 40, and 50 for fleet operators who prefer grade simplification across different equipment.

features.title: Diesel & Gasoline Compatible
features.desc: Suitable for both diesel and gasoline engines, giving mixed-fleet operators the convenience of a single engine oil.

features.title: Transmission System Capable
features.desc: SAE 10W and 30 grades meet GMC Allison C-3 requirements, suitable for automatic transmissions, torque converters, and hydraulic systems.

applications: Crankcase lubrication for diesel engines in automotive and industrial equipment
Both naturally aspirated and turbocharged diesel engines
Gasoline engines in passenger cars and trucks
On-highway and off-highway heavy construction equipment
Automatic transmissions and torque converters (SAE 10W and 30 grades)
Fleet operations where grade simplification is preferred

faqs.q: Which SAE grade of Laon Core should I use?
faqs.a: SAE 30 and 40 are the most common for standard operating temperatures. SAE 10W is used for colder climates or equipment requiring a lighter viscosity. SAE 50 is for very high temperatures or heavily loaded engines. Always follow your engine manufacturer's recommendations.

faqs.q: Can Laon Core be used in automatic transmissions?
faqs.a: Yes. The SAE 10W and SAE 30 grades of Laon Core meet GMC Allison C-3 requirements and can be used in automatic transmissions, torque converters, and hydraulic systems where such specifications apply.

faqs.q: Is Laon Core suitable for heavy construction equipment?
faqs.a: Yes. Laon Core is designed for heavy-duty operation in both on-highway and off-highway vehicles and equipment, including construction machinery.
